steps.title: Use the positive context
steps.content: Gogol is gratified that the small components he works on are essential parts of real buildings. A "practical end" must mean something useful that his work achieves.

steps.title: Match end to use
steps.content: A would mean a limit, B would mean a delay, and C would mean a decision; none fits the satisfying usefulness described in the sentence. Purpose fits because Gogol is pleased his work will have a practical use. The answer is D.
